description: FHIR-native healthcare data platform enabling health systems and payers to aggregate, transform, and exchange clinical data. Provides FHIR server, data lake, and analytics capabilities. Early TEFCA participant.
business_model: B2B - FHIR platform to health systems and payers
target_market: Health systems, health plans, life sciences companies

varden_fit.rationale: FHIR infrastructure leader - validates FHIR-first approach
